description: These T-strap sandals from catwalk are given a fresh twist with the cut outs and stud detailing. The simple design is perfect for everyday wear. Team these with dresses, and jeans and tops.UpperSynthetic leather T-straps on the forefootStitch detailing and stud detailing for added style and reinforcementFabric lining for comfortFabric covered footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
